name: 7 Minute Boiled Crawfish
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a 60 qt pot about half full.
2. Add all ingredients except the crawfish and bring to a boil.
3. Add the crawfish.
4. Cook for 7 minutes when it boils again.
5. Turn off the heat.
6. Add one bucket of cold water.
7. Let it soak for one hour.
